top_findings: Missing Service schema on service pages
Lack of Organization schema blocks semantic entity mapping

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Robots.txt is present and configured correctly.
XML Sitemap is referenced in robots.txt and available.
All crawled HTML pages are correctly registered in the sitemap.
SSL/TLS Encryption (HTTPS) is enforced across all analyzed pages.
Zero broken internal links (404 errors) were encountered during the crawl.
All crawled pages contain a self-referential canonical URL tag.
No primary pages are blocked from search indexing.

findings.title: Mismatched or cross-referenced canonical tags
findings.description: Found 1 pages where the canonical URL does not match the actual page URL. Example: https://ltevo.com/ -> https://ltevo.com
findings.recommendation: Verify if the cross-referenced canonicals are intentional (e.g. tracking parameters or pagination). If not, update to self-referential.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: All content is written in clear, natural Spanish suitable for local Spanish business clients.

findings.title: Thin content pages detected
findings.description: Found 1 pages below recommended word counts. Example: https://ltevo.com/servicios/mantenimiento-web has only 515 words (recommended min: 800)
findings.recommendation: Expand thin pages with high-quality, unique text. Elaborate on service characteristics, case studies, or process details.

findings.title: Missing critical E-E-A-T trust signals
findings.description: The website is missing several trust elements: Physical Address / Office Location, Contact Phone Number on the home page or footer.
findings.recommendation: Add a physical address, phone number, direct email, and links to your privacy policy and terms of service in a global site footer.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: All crawled pages have a defined title tag.
All crawled pages have a meta description tag.
All crawled pages have exactly one H1 tag.

findings.title: Sub-optimal title tag length
findings.description: Found 2 titles below 30 characters (e.g. 'Términos de Uso | LTEvo' on https://ltevo.com/terminos).
findings.recommendation: Optimize title tags to be between 30 and 60 characters to ensure they display fully in search engine results without truncation.

findings.title: Sub-optimal meta description length
findings.description: Found 3 short (< 120 chars) and 1 long (> 160 chars) meta descriptions.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite meta descriptions to fit in the 120-160 character range.

findings.title: Missing WebSite schema
findings.description: No WebSite schema JSON-LD was detected on the homepage. This schema establishes the site name and search box capabilities.
findings.recommendation: Add JSON-LD WebSite schema to the homepage markup specifying the business name and URL.

findings.title: Missing Organization or LocalBusiness schema
findings.description: No Organization or LocalBusiness schema was found on the homepage. This is critical for Local SEO and company identity.
findings.recommendation: Implement LocalBusiness schema on the homepage footer or contact page detailing name, address, telephone, logo, and hours.

findings.title: Missing Service schema on service pages
findings.description: Found 3 service pages without Service schema markup: https://ltevo.com/servicios/diseno-web, https://ltevo.com/servicios/seo, https://ltevo.com/servicios/mantenimiento-web
findings.recommendation: Implement JSON-LD Service schema on all pages under `/servicios/` to specify service name, description, provider, and areaServed.

categories.name: Performance
what_works: All analyzed pages returned a prompt Time to First Byte (TTFB) below 1.5 seconds.
Site runs on Next.js, allowing server-side rendering (SSR) and optimized hydration.

categories.name: Images
what_works: All parsed images contain the required 'alt' description tags.
All images are served in modern web formats (WebP/AVIF/SVG).

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: AI bots (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot) are allowed in robots.txt via the wildcard directive.
A machine-readable llms.txt is deployed, providing structured context to LLMs.
Pages utilize lists and bullet points, improving reading efficiency and AI citation extraction.

findings.title: Lack of Organization schema blocks semantic entity mapping
findings.description: Without Organization schema, LLMs have difficulty associating your brand name with specific services or locations in knowledge graphs.
findings.recommendation: Deploy a complete Organization schema detailing brand aliases, parent organization, and legal name.

categories.name: Search Experience (SXO)
what_works: Lead generation forms are present on the contact page.
Mobile viewport meta tag is correctly configured on all pages.

categories.name: Sitemap & Coverage
what_works: Sitemap exists and conforms to Sitemap 0.9 protocol.
